description: Generic searchable dropdown with client-side or server-side data loading, keyboard navigation, custom item templates, and a clear button. Supports two-way binding via Value/ValueChanged.

examples.title: Client-side filterable dropdown
examples.code:
<TmFilterableDropdown TItem="string" TValue="string"
    Items="@countries"
    @bind-Value="selectedCountry"
    Placeholder="Select country"
    ShowClearButton="true" />

examples.title: Server-side data provider with custom template
examples.code: @context.FullName (@context.Email)
